title: Director of Early Childhood Intervention
notes: Largest district in MT (~16k students). Runs KinderREADy preschool aligned to Montana Early Learning Standards. Cindy Keller is Preschool Coordinator (406-281-5362). Title I district.

title: Principal, Early Learning Family Center
notes: GFPS runs the Early Learning Family Center (ELFC) at 3300 3rd St NE, a transitional preschool serving 3-5 year olds. Title I. Note that GF Elem and GF HS share central administration. Email pattern inferred from gfps.k12.mt.us domain - verify.

title: Superintendent
notes: Tribal district on Blackfeet Reservation. Cobell took over July 2024 after former Billings Supt Greg Upham served as interim through 2024 turnaround after $2.5M financial mismanagement crisis. Christy Day Chief is principal. Likely Head Start partnership; tiny district (~150 students K-12).

title: Assistant Superintendent (K-8 Curriculum & Instruction)
notes: SD5 runs Early Learning Targeted Intervention Program for 4-year-olds plus early childhood screening. Cole leads K-8 curriculum. Email pattern inferred from sd5.k12.mt.us domain - verify. District facing budget pressure/layoffs since late 2024.

title: Director of Curriculum, Assessment & Professional Development (incoming Interim Superintendent 2026-27)
